name: Hmc Capital Limited
analysis: HMC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.9900, stop A$2.7522, target A$4.0284 (4.37:1) — then trail it.
